team_spec.vision: A ledger that records allocations without turning every gift, favor, or relational act into surveillance.
team_spec.spec:
Build a single-file Python tool, run as `python3 tool.py `. Reads JSON shaped { "allocations": [ {"allocation_id":"...","allocation_type":"money"|"time"|"material"|"introduction"|"care"|"knowledge"|"infrastructure","public_summary":"...","recipient_visibility":"public"|"private","funder_visibility":"public"|"private","amount_visibility":"public"|"private","recipient":"...","funder":"...","amount":|null,"unit":"..."|null,"not_tracked_reason":"..."|null,"withdrawn":}, ...] }. For each non-withdrawn allocation, build a public-safe receipt: include public_summary; include recipient ONLY if recipient_visibility=='public'; include funder ONLY if funder_visibility=='public'; include amount + unit ONLY if amount_visibility=='public' AND amount is not null. If not_tracked_reason is non-null, mark the allocation as 'not-tracked-by-design' and include only the public_summary + the reason — no amount, no recipient, no funder regardless of visibility flags. Print to stdout in this order: (1) header 'UNTRACKED ALLOCATION LEDGER (

public / not-tracked / withdrawn of total)'; (2) blank line; (3) for each non-withdrawn entry in input order, a block: '- []:' then ' summary: ' then if not-tracked-by-design: ' not-tracked-by-design: ' else conditionally: ' recipient: ' / ' funder: ' / ' amount: ' depending on visibility flags. End each block with one blank line. (4) Then an aggregate section: 'AGGREGATE BY TYPE:' followed by, for each allocation_type that appears in non-withdrawn non-not-tracked entries (alphabetical), ' : entries' (the aggregate suppresses amounts; never sum amounts across entries to avoid creating surveillance pressure). On invalid JSON, single 'error:' line, exit 0. Stdlib only.

allocations.public_summary: A mentor pair supported one team for the first hour.
A relational act of care was offered between two participants.
allocations.not_tracked_reason: by design — not all care is accounting

allocations.public_summary: A community fund made a contribution.
An introduction was made; contributor later asked to withdraw it from the ledger.

excluded_inputs.boundary: Recipient/funder/amount fields whose visibility is 'private' are held by the team and never appear in the public receipt.
excluded_inputs.note: the spec applies these visibility gates structurally

description: aggregate section counts entries by type but never sums amounts

review_checks: no private field ever appears for an entry whose visibility is private

witness_record_seed.receipt_statement: This record states what happened. It does not establish authority, approval, certification, legitimacy, community consent, or readiness for reuse.
